hooks.command: jq -n --arg d "$(date +%Y-%m-%d)" '{"systemMessage": "Session \($d) \u2014 lechner-studios (studio portfolio site, lechner-studios.at). Bilingual EN/DE, Cormorant + Manrope typography, ink palette. Check ai-brain/backlog/INDEX.md for active P0 blockers."}'

out=$(bash $HOME/dev/ai-brain/scripts/session-start-check.sh lechner-studios 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$out" ]; then jq -n --arg m "$out" '{"systemMessage": ("Unapplied ADR entries affecting lechner-studios:\n\n" + $m)}'; fi

echo '{"systemMessage": "Before compacting: preserve (1) current branch name and any uncommitted file paths, (2) active P0 blockers from this session, (3) what was accomplished and what still remains open."}'
echo '{"systemMessage": "Turn complete \u2014 verify: tests pass \u00b7 no PII in diff \u00b7 if context feels slow, /compact with a summary hint before the next task."}'
